Title: Sam — Planning their path
Bio: First-year domestic undergraduate navigating course planning and enrolment across 7 systems — the hub's two parallel guidance trees My Course Planner on StudyOS the Handbook on a different platform a legacy FAQ and the my.unimelb enrolment wall. Census-dates page canonicalises to /page-not-found.
Systems traversed: ~6: study.unimelb → vtac.edu.au → my.unimelb → students.unimelb → handbook.unimelb → faculty site

Title: Alessandra — At-risk & withdrawal
Bio: Second-year domestic student hitting academic difficulty for the first time — needs special consideration wellbeing support financial hardship and withdrawal advice. Counselling delivery is off-brand (services.unimelb branded Academic Skills Unit 614× vs Counselling 39×). Every decisive action is behind a different login wall.
Systems traversed: ~6: students.unimelb (2-3 trees) → services.unimelb → specialconsideration.app → my.unimelb → safercommunity.unimelb → forms.your

Title: Priya — International student
Bio: International postgraduate from India on a subclass-500 student visa — navigated conditional CoE agent-gated application and AUD$17000 deposit. Visa conditions described across 3 forked trees but never wired to enrolment actions. Post-study work visa (485) has zero pages. OSHC link targets wrong page.
Systems traversed: ~8: study.unimelb → eStudent → my.unimelb → students.unimelb (3 trees) → services.unimelb → forms.your → faculty → alumni

Title: Jordan — Course planning maze
Bio: Second-year BSc student trying to plan a major sequence — 4 tabs open (Course Planner Handbook faculty PDF FAQ) to answer one question. Seven-system toolchain with two parallel guidance trees two planning tools and a broken census page. 343 hub pages for this task — 41% of total footprint.
Systems traversed: ~7: students.unimelb (2 trees) → studyos → handbook → ask.unimelb → my.unimelb → mytimetable → forms.your

Title: Taylor — Wellbeing & mental health crisis
Bio: Third-year undergraduate with anxiety and depression seeking help — searches mental health and lands on a page branded Academic Skills Unit. Must cross 3-4 hosts with inconsistent labels to reach counselling. Financial hardship support is ~5 pages. Crisis services on separate uncrawled domains.
Systems traversed: ~6: students.unimelb (2-3 trees) → services.unimelb → specialconsideration.app → my.unimelb → safercommunity.unimelb → forms.your
